justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of high-yield corporate debt, which is a specific financial metric used to measure credit risk and bond performance in capital markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-01-04?
